runners.formComment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won by 3 lengths at this track (20.00) beating Pretty Miss in a Maiden on April 8. Will find this much tougher but he's got good box manners and speed. Has returned in winning form and can measure up again.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 352m at this track beaten a nose (20.20) behind Hara's Collar in a Maiden on April 8. Racing well and deserves a win.

runners.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 352m (20.01) beating Jane's Fury in Maiden on April 8. Maiden winner recently but needs to improve further.

runners.formComment: Turned in a sound debut over 352m at this track where she was well back early but wound up strongly to finish second (20.28) and beaten 4 lengths. Capable of a strong show.
